from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Protocol


class Notifier(Protocol):
    def send(self, recipient: str, message: str) -> None: ...


class EmailNotifier:
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        print(f"Email to {recipient}: {message}")


class SlackNotifier:
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        print(f"Slack to {recipient}: {message}")


class AttachmentSender:
    def __init__(self, notifier: Notifier):
        self._notifier = notifier

    def send(self, recipient, message):
        self._notifier.send(recipient, message)
        print(f"Attachment sent to {recipient}")


class RetrySender:
    def __init__(self, notifier: Notifier, max_retries: int = 3):
        self._notifier = notifier
        self._max_retries = max_retries

    def send(self, recipient, message):
        for attempt in range(self._max_retries):
            try:
                self._notifier.send(recipient, message)
                return
            except Exception:
                continue


class ThreadSender:
    def __init__(self, notifier: Notifier):
        self._notifier = notifier

    def send(self, recipient, message):
        self._notifier.send(recipient, message)
        print(f"Thread created for {recipient}")
